bead.title: test(agent): end-to-end test CLI flag → ExecuteBeadOptions → Runner → routing evidence persisted
bead.description:
Opus epic review (2026-04-15): no end-to-end integration test exercises the full routing pipeline. Tests are isolated on individual pieces (ValidateOrphanModel, resolveNativeAgentProvider, appendBeadRoutingEvidence).

Add cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_e2e_routing_test.go that drives runAgentExecuteBead through a cobra command with a fake agentlib.Provider, exercises a full resolve → run → append-evidence path, and asserts (a) the fake provider was called with the resolved model, (b) the kind:routing event is persisted to the bead store with the expected fields.
bead.acceptance: (1) New test drives runAgentExecuteBead via a cobra Command.Execute call, not by unit-calling internal functions. (2) Test injects a fake AgentRunner + fake BeadStore. (3) Assertions cover the full resolved_provider/resolved_model/route_reason set. (4) Test passes with the current implementation.
